name: senna-pov-them
prompt: POV shot into dim room. Dark-haired man's hands cupping silver-haired woman's face, shattered crystalline earring, destroyed cold visible as melted frost. Intimacy interrupted. What she's seeing: her claim, claimed by another. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: senna-lethal
prompt: Close-up. Red-haired woman, green eyes going lethal — fury, possession, betrayal. Heat-haze blazing around her. Expression murderous. Red-orange glow from her power. Dark radiating lines — impact moment. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-doesnt-move
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired young man standing firm, not flinching, arms at his sides. Amber eyes staring directly at camera with calm defiance. Heat shimmer around him. Unbothered, unafraid. Dim storage room background. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-asks-rei
prompt: Close-up portrait. Dark-haired young man in dim storage room, amber eyes soft and vulnerable, looking slightly downward at someone close. Gentle questioning expression. No aggression, only tenderness. Concrete wall behind. Warm amber lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: Is that what you want? You want me to go?
